raw_title: Book Review: ‘They Stole a City,’ by Lauren Collins
book_title: ‘They Stole a City,’ by Lauren Collins
description: A new book by the journalist Lauren Collins chronicles the ongoing effects of the violent takeover of Wilmington, N.C., on those living in its aftermath.
In “Air,” by the Swiss writer Christian Kracht, a decorator’s unusual commission leads abruptly into another universe.
